xiao2025textregion.title: TextRegion: Text-Aligned Region Tokens from Frozen Image-Text Models
xiao2025textregion.author: Yao Xiao, Qiqian Fu, Heyi Tao, Yuqun Wu, Zhen Zhu, Derek Hoiem
xiao2025textregion.tlrd: A simple, training-free approach to get region tokens directly comparable to text embeddings, achieving state-of-the-art zero-shot region-level understanding.
